status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Store only to R2 (remove local and S3 storage backends)
features.user_visible_behavior: All stored files (transcriptions, sentences, translations, subtitle tracks) are written to Cloudflare R2 only; the API never writes them to the local filesystem and no longer serves a local /files mount.
verification: grep src/ for LocalFileAdapter, S3Adapter, storage_backend, local_storage, StaticFiles — no matches.
tests/test_storage.py proves get_storage() returns R2Adapter and raises StorageError listing missing R2_* env vars.
evidence: 2026-06-10: ./init.sh — 5 tests passed, ruff all checks passed, app boots with 12 routes.
2026-06-10: grep for removed symbols across src/, tests/, scripts/, alembic/ returned no matches.
features.notes: R2 config is validated lazily in get_storage(), so the app still boots without R2_* env vars but any storage use fails with an explicit StorageError. Implemented on branch feature/r2-only-storage.
